title: Counter Factory
prompt: Write a Hemlock program that implements a `make_counter(start)` function which returns an object with three methods: `increment` (adds 1), `decrement` (subtracts 1), and `value` (returns current count). Each method should be a closure capturing the counter state. Create a counter starting at 10, call increment 3 times, decrement once, and print the result of value() after each operation (4 prints total).
